:["bzz-raw://ebaca65a1d5825fb395534619fc18455933e1d74bc16c70bac9f34761d3bba6d","dweb:/ipfs/Qma8Dw6H7eqJ6qaGjHKfgYRX9XPy94JGp9dQ4YXsim9aJ8"]}},"version":1}

params.syntheticAmount: Amount of synthetic tokens to burn

depositAndMint(string,uint256,uint256).details: Fixes GOO-177: eth_call simulations of sequential depositCollateral+mint calls      returned false InsufficientCollateral reverts because state from the deposit      simulation was not visible to the separate mint simulation. This combined      function allows the full flow to be simulated as a single eth_call.

params.collateralAmount: G$ to deposit as collateral (18 decimals)
params.syntheticAmount: Synthetic tokens to mint (18 decimals = 1 share)

returns.ratio: Collateral ratio in BPS; type(uint256).max if no debt

getMintRequirements(address,string,uint2.details: Use this for eth_call simulations instead of simulating the full mint flow.      Passing additionalCollateral lets the frontend account for a pending deposit      in the same simulation without needing a sequential two-call approach.

params.additionalCollateral: Extra G$ the user would deposit before minting (may be 0)

returns.available: Collateral available after accounting for existing debt and pending deposit
returns.fee: G$ fee charged from wallet (not from collateral)
returns.requiredCollateral: Minimum collateral backing needed for this mint at 150% CR

liquidate(address,string).details: Caller must hold sufficient synthetic tokens to repay the full debt.      Caller receives the debt value in G$ plus a 10% bonus; remainder goes      to the fee splitter (funds UBI).

params.user: Address of the position owner to liquidate

params.syntheticAmount: Amount of synthetic tokens to mint (1e18 = 1 share)

LIQUIDATION_BONUS_BPS().notice: Liquidator bonus expressed as percentage of the repaid debt value (10%)

LIQUIDATION_RATIO().notice: Collateral ratio below which liquidation is allowed (120%)

MIN_COLLATERAL_RATIO().notice: Minimum collateral ratio to open a position (150%)

acceptAdmin().notice: Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.         Must be called by the previously proposed admin.

burn(string,uint256).notice: Burn synthetic tokens and release collateral proportionally.

collateral(address,bytes32).notice: user -> ticker key -> collateral deposited (G$ with 18 decimals)

debt(address,bytes32).notice: user -> ticker key -> synthetic tokens minted (18 decimals = 1 share)

depositAndMint(string,uint256,uint256).notice: Deposit collateral and immediately mint synthetic tokens in one transaction.

getCollateralRatio(address,string).notice: Get the collateral ratio for a user's position (in BPS, e.g. 15000 = 150%)

getMintRequirements(address,string,uint2.notice: Preview a mint: returns collateral/fee requirements and whether the user         can mint now (with optional pending collateral deposit included).

getPosition(address,string).notice: Get position info for a user

mint(string,uint256).notice: Mint synthetic stock tokens against deposited collateral.

oracleKeys(bytes32).notice: ticker key -> oracle key (same by default, but separable)

pendingAdmin().notice: Pending admin for two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).

registerAsset(string,address).notice: Register a synthetic asset with this vault.

setAdmin(address).notice: Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).         Sets a pending admin who must call `acceptAdmin` to complete the         transfer. Protects against accidentally transferring admin to         a wrong address.

syntheticAssets(bytes32).notice: Registered synthetic assets: ticker key -> SyntheticAsset

withdrawCollateral(string,uint256).notice: Withdraw excess collateral, provided the position remains above MIN_COLLATERAL_RATIO.

documentation.text:
@title CollateralVault
 @notice Core GoodStocks contract. Users deposit G$ as collateral and mint
         synthetic stock tokens at a minimum 150% collateral ratio.
         Fee model: 0.3% of the USD value of each mint/burn is charged in G$
         and forwarded to the UBI fee splitter (20% -> UBI pool).
         Liquidation: anyone can liquidate a position whose collateral ratio
         falls below LIQUIDATION_RATIO (120%). The liquidator provides the
         synthetic tokens, receives debt value in G$ plus a 10% bonus,
         and the remaining collateral is forwarded to the fee splitter.
@notice Minimum collateral ratio to open a position (150%)
@notice Collateral ratio below which liquidation is allowed (120%)
@notice Liquidator bonus expressed as percentage of the repaid debt value (10%)
@notice Mint/burn fee in basis points (0.3%)
@notice Pending admin for two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).
@notice user -> ticker key -> collateral deposited (G$ with 18 decimals)
@notice user -> ticker key -> synthetic tokens minted (18 decimals = 1 share)
@notice total G$ locked per ticker
@notice Registered synthetic assets: ticker key -> SyntheticAsset
@notice ticker key -> oracle key (same by default, but separable)

@notice Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).
         Sets a pending admin who must call `acceptAdmin` to complete the
         transfer. Protects against accidentally transferring admin to
         a wrong address.

@notice Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.
         Must be called by the previously proposed admin.

@dev Minimum 0.001 GDT (1e15 wei). Guards against accidental USDC-scaled deposits
      (e.g. passing 500_000_000 for "500 USDC" when vault expects 18-decimal GDT).

@notice Get the collateral ratio for a user's position (in BPS, e.g. 15000 = 150%)
 @return ratio Collateral ratio in BPS; type(uint256).max if no debt
@notice Get position info for a user

@dev Compute the available collateral and canMint flag.
      Extracted from `getMintRequirements` to reduce stack depth for forge coverage.

@dev Compute the required collateral and fee for a mint.
      Extracted from `getMintRequirements` to reduce stack depth for forge coverage.
@notice How much collateral is currently committed to backing active debt
